hero.subtitle: Sewing, sewing patterns & workshops for those who want to create something themselves.

about.intro: A creative brand built on craftsmanship, aesthetics, and presence.
about.founder: My name is Emilie, and I'm the founder of Intetkøn. Here, I create patterns, products, and workshops with room for personality, learning, and creative freedom.
about.quote: Intetkøn is an inclusive universe for those who love making things by hand and want to be part of something that feels human, inspiring, and open to everyone.

newsletter.title: Discover the latest techniques, behind-the-scenes stories, and workshop announcements straight from the atelier.
newsletter.label: Journal
newsletter.heading: Dive into Intetkøn.

hangaroundBag.label: Soon for sale, hangaround bag
hangaroundBag.description: A simple, functional, versatile and beginner-friendly sewing pattern design for everyday use.

workshops.label: Something Beautiful Is Coming… Sewing Workshops Soon
workshops.description: A workshop for anyone who wants to start sewing in a safe and creative way, whether you have never held a needle before or already sew professionally.

community.title: Join the Community
community.description: Be part of the community and become a pattern tester, whether you are just getting started or already have experience with sewing and design.

patternTester.title: Become a pattern tester
patternTester.description: Help us refine our latest drops. Join a dedicated group of makers who value precision, inclusive fit, and garment craft. Shape the future of our atelier.

hero.title: ABOUT
hero.subtitle: Breaking the binary in fashion through freedom of expression and long-lasting craft.

mission.heading: Our
mission.description: Fast fashion wasn't built for everyone or for the Earth. We started INTETKØN to offer a different path: gender-neutral design, transparent making, and open knowledge.

why.title: Why we started
why.description: Every piece and pattern is an invitation to create clothes that fit your body, your values, and your vibe, no gender labels needed. By sharing patterns and workshops, we give you the tools to make garments you're proud to wear and repair.

features.title: Genderless Design
features.description: Silhouettes and sizing that fit bodies, not boxes. Genderless from the first sketch.

features.title: Learning Hub
features.description: Step-by-step tutorials and projector-ready files so you can sew confidently at home.

features.title: Circular Mindset
features.description: We champion upcycling and repair, encouraging re-use long after 'new'.

cta.headline: REWRITE THE
cta.description: Pick a pattern. Grab a kit. Upcycle your closet. Let's rewrite the rules of fashion, one stitch at a time.

hero.title: CONTACT
hero.subtitle: Questions about a pattern, a bespoke order, or just want to say hi? Our digital atelier is always open.

inquiries.label: Customer Service & Bespoke
inquiries.description: Inquiries about sizing, fit, or custom commissions.

inquiries.label: Press & Loans
inquiries.description: Editorial features, stylist pulls, and media kits.

inquiries.label: Wholesale & Business
inquiries.description: Partnering with Intetkøn for retail or collaborations.

hero.title: PRIVACY
hero.subtitle: Your data is handled with the same care as our garments.

whoWeAre.heading: Who we are
whoWeAre.intro: INTETKØN ("we", "us", "our") takes your privacy seriously. This Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, and your rights under the EU/EEA General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

items.title: Browsing
items.description: Device usage, IP address, and interaction data via cookies.

items.title: Shopping
items.description: Name, email, shipping address, and order history.

items.title: Subscribing
items.description: Email address and preferences for our sewing revolution updates.

items.title: Workshops
items.description: Registration details, sessions, and accessibility preferences.

purposes.heading: Purposes & Legal Bases
purposes.description: We process your data to provide our services (contract necessity), process payments via Stripe (legitimate interests), communicate with you, and ensure legal compliance with tax and accounting obligations.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.description: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict your data. To exercise these rights or lodge a complaint, simply contact our studio team.

payments.heading: Payments (Stripe)
payments.description: We use Stripe for secure transactions. They act as a processor and receive identifiers necessary for fraud detection. We do not store your payment card data on our servers.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies for core site functionality, analytics, and performance. You can manage your preferences via our cookie banner or browser settings at any time.

internationalTransfers.heading: International Transfers
internationalTransfers.description: Data transferred outside the EU/EEA relies on Standard Contractual Clauses or recognized frameworks.

ageOfConsent.heading: Age of Consent
ageOfConsent.description: By using this site, you confirm you are of legal age or have parental consent.

footer.heading: Questions or Requests?
footer.description: Our studio team is here to help with any privacy concerns.

hero.title: KINDNESS &
hero.subtitle: We design for longevity. If something isn't right, let's find a solution.

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: Covers physical products (kits, garments), digital items (patterns, videos), and workshops.

ethos.title: Our Ethos
ethos.description: Distance sales rely on good faith. Email us before buying if you are unsure; we seek amicable solutions.

deadstock.label: Deadstock Materials:
deadstock.description: Some products use upcycled components and may have minor imperfections. We preserve the usable area.

colourVariance.label: Colour Variance:
colourVariance.description: Screen displays vary. Colour variance alone does not qualify for a refund.

eligibilityWindow.title: Eligibility Window
eligibilityWindow.description: 14 days from delivery (EU withdrawal right). Items must be unused and in original packaging.

exclusions.title: Exclusions
exclusions.description: Custom/made-to-order items, hygiene-sensitive items (if opened), and used/washed goods.

faultyItems.title: Faulty Items
faultyItems.description: Contact us within 14 days with photos if an item is defective or damaged in transit.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.description: Customer covers return shipping unless faulty. Original shipping is non-refundable.

digitalGoods.title: Digital Goods
digitalGoods.description: Patterns and videos are non-refundable once delivery begins. Your right of withdrawal ends once access starts.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.description: Reschedule possible up to 7 days before. Inside 7 days, we cannot refund as materials are committed. No-shows are not refundable.

eu.label: EU Orders
eu.description: VAT is charged at checkout. B2B customers with valid VAT numbers may be zero-rated upon verification.

nonEu.label: Non-EU (UK, etc.)
nonEu.description: Exported without Danish VAT. Import duties and local fees are the customer's responsibility.

repairs.title: Repairs (Goodwill)
repairs.description: We may offer complimentary minor repairs on INTETKØN products. Shipping is the customer's responsibility.

footer.heading: Start a Return
footer.description: Email us with your order number and photos before sending anything back.

hero.title: TERMS OF
hero.subtitle: By using our atelier services, you agree to the following rules of the house.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: By visiting our website and/or purchasing something from us, you engage in our "Service" and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"), including additional terms, policies and notices referenced here or available by hyperlink.

storeTerms.title: Store Terms
storeTerms.description: You confirm you are of the age of majority. You may not use our products for any unauthorized or illegal purpose, including copyright violations.

generalConditions.title: General Conditions
generalConditions.description: We reserve the right to refuse service. Your content may be transferred unencrypted (excluding payment data which is always encrypted).

accuracy.title: Accuracy & Timeliness
accuracy.description: We are not responsible if information on this site is not accurate or current. Material is for general information and reliance is at your own risk.

modifications.title: Modifications & Products
modifications.description: Prices are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue services. We have made every effort to display colors accurately, but monitor displays vary.

billing.title: Billing & Payments
billing.description: We reserve the right to refuse any order. Payments are processed by third-party providers like Stripe. You agree to provide current, complete, and accurate purchase information for all transactions.

userContent.title: User Content & Feedback
userContent.description: If you submit creative ideas or comments, we may edit, copy, and distribute them in any medium without obligation to pay compensation or respond.

prohibitedUses.title: Prohibited Uses
prohibitedUses.description: You are prohibited from using the site for unlawful purposes, infringing on intellectual property, transmitting viruses, or scraping content. Violation results in immediate termination.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.description: The Service and all products are provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind. In no case shall INTETKØN be liable for any injury, loss, claim, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.description: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Denmark.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.description: We reserve the right to update or replace any part of these Terms by posting updates to our website.

footer.heading: Questions about the Terms?
footer.description: Send us an email and our studio team will get back to you.

hero.title: JOIN THE
hero.subtitle: Help us rewrite the rules of fashion. We're building a community-driven studio where craft meets inclusivity.

jobCard.title: Motivated Intern
jobCard.quote: If you're passionate about genderless design, upcycling, and learning by doing, we'd love to hear from you.
jobCard.description: Please send your application, CV, and portfolio to our studio team. We review applications on a rolling basis.

hero.title: TEST OUR
hero.subtitle: Precision is a collective effort. Join our pool of testers and help us create the perfect fit for every body.

lookingFor.title: What we look for

footer.text: By applying, you agree to our privacy policy regarding data handling.
